benefits.description: Lost 40-45 pounds in about 4 months, then stalled. After taking a month off dieting and dropping Reta to 1mg/wk, restarted weight loss 2 weeks ago with easier progress, now peeling off last 14 pounds more easily

protocol_notes: Had weight loss plateau despite tight diet and increased exercise. Took a month break from dieting (maintained Reta at 1mg/wk), then restarted. Weight loss resumed more easily after the break. Appears to be cycling or metabolic adaptation strategy.
